programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Probing a priest's murder Murdoch learns his long-lost sister is now a nun who claims a demon caused the death.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull helps mount a defense for Taylor's brother-in-law, a prison guard charged with manslaughter for the drowning deaths of two inmates in the middle of a hurricane; Bull aims to convince the jury that his client tried to prevent a "greater harm."

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull must convince a jury that an alleged murder was actually a tragic accident when TAC represents a woman charged in her 3-year-old stepdaughter's death; Benny gives Bull some surprising news.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: As Bull prepares for fatherhood, his work at TAC suffers without his top attorney Benny, who quit in reaction to Bull's romantic reconnection to Isabella; the team must mount a defense for a young bartender on trial for involuntary manslaughter.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A charismatic entrepreneur is accused of defrauding investors in her seemingly groundbreaking water filtration company; Bull focuses on selecting jurors whose belief systems allow them to see his client as a dreamer who never meant criminal intent.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Benny's previous career with the district attorney's office comes into focus when Chunk aims to get a new trial for a man he believes was wrongfully convicted of triple homicide by a prosecution team that included Benny.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull helps a famous social media influencer take her father to court to overturn his legal guardianship over her empire, which he was granted after the young mogul suffered a public mental breakdown.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Taylor becomes personally invested in having Bull help a dancer bring a civil suit against a real estate mogul who assaulted her at a gentlemen's club when the district attorney's office refuses to pursue criminal charges.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: A mommy vlogger seeks to uncover the truth behind her best friend Emily's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Come and Find Me
programme.desc: A man gets caught in the criminal underworld as he searches for his girlfriend, who's mysteriously disappeared

programme.title: Alice, Darling
programme.desc: A woman's identity and friendships are tested as she breaks free from her psychologically abusive boyfriend.

programme.title: Black Bear
programme.desc: A director works on her latest screenplay at a cabin, where she witnesses the deterioration of a marriage.

programme.title: Miller's Girl
programme.desc: A precocious young writer becomes involved with her high school creative writing teacher.

programme.title: Hit & Run [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Charlie Bronson (Dax Shepard), a nice guy with a shady past as a getaway driver, breaks out of the witness protection program in a backwater California town to drive his girlfriend, Annie (Kristen Bell), to Los Angeles for an important job interview. The pair's road trip takes an awkward and dangerous turn when they find that an inept federal agent (Tom Arnold) and the mobster (Bradley Cooper) he testified against are both trying to hunt them down.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Jack's Back [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: In a sickening coincidence -- or a sinister homage to actual crimes -- women are being murdered in Los Angeles 100 years after Jack the Ripper terrorized London. Police think John Westford, a young doctor, is the murderer, and when he's found hanging from a noose, authorities believe his apparent suicide is a tacit admission of guilt. But his twin brother, Rick (also Spader), insists John was killed, and, when it appears Rick is right, the investigation takes a stunning turn.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Hit & Run [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Charlie Bronson (Dax Shepard), a nice guy with a shady past as a getaway driver, breaks out of the witness protection program in a backwater California town to drive his girlfriend, Annie (Kristen Bell), to Los Angeles for an important job interview. The pair's road trip takes an awkward and dangerous turn when they find that an inept federal agent (Tom Arnold) and the mobster (Bradley Cooper) he testified against are both trying to hunt them down.

programme.title: The Rebound
programme.desc: In New York City, a single mom captivates her new neighbor, a much younger man.

programme.title: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: A modern retelling of the classic fairy tale.

programme.title: After We Collided
programme.desc: Based on the 2014 romance novel of the same name, this follows the love life of two young adults.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: Two North Carolina teens, Landon Carter and Jamie Sullivan, are thrown together after Landon gets into trouble

programme.title: The Throwaways
programme.desc: A notorious hacker captured by the CIA is given a proposition: Work for them or spend the rest of his life in prison.

programme.title: Lake Placid 2
programme.desc: Three giant crocodiles terrorize locals and tourists at a lakeside resort.

programme.title: Lake Placid 3
programme.desc: Monstrous crocodiles terrorize a serene country lake, leading to a bloody showdown as a wildlife scientist, local sheriff and feisty female hunter converge to take these predators down.

programme.title: Red Water
programme.desc: A freshwater shark wreaks havoc as it heads up a Louisiana river.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: The world's three best pilots are partnered with a state-of-the-art, fully-automated, pilotless, super stealth warplane - inhuman and invincible. But once in the air, it goes haywire, leaving them with one final mission - bring it down.

programme.title: The Lone Wolf And His Lady
programme.desc: Ron Randell plays a former jewel thief turned reporter, who gets into trouble when he is assigned to cover the exhibition of a famous diamond. When the jewel disappears, Randell is accused of stealing it. It is all Randell can do to keep out of the police's reach, so he can track down the real culprits.

programme.title: The Wrecking Crew
programme.desc: Matt Helm, ICE's greatest secret agent, must retrieve one billion dollars in stolen gold before the world's economy collapses.

programme.title: It Had To Be You
programme.desc: Ginger Rogers stars in this fanciful, screwball comedy as a young woman who has left three grooms standing at the altar...and is about to do it again! Cornel Wilde co-stars as the gentleman who tempts her away from the altar and then succeeds in marrying her himself.

programme.title: Dr. Strangelove Or: How I Learned To Stop Worrying And Love The Bomb
programme.desc: Wickedly dark comedy features Peter Sellers (in three roles) in the midst of impending nuclear war.Co-stars George C. Scott.

programme.title: The Whole Town's Talking
programme.desc: A mild-mannered clerk's life is turned upside down by his exact double -- a ruthless gangster and Public Enemy Number One.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: A ragtag group of Pennsylvanians barricade themselves in an old farmhouse to remain safe from a bloodthirsty, flesh-eating breed of monsters who are ravaging the East Coast of the United States.

programme.title: A Tale Of Two Guns
programme.desc: In the lawless West, The Cowboys a notorious brotherhood of killers and thieves reigned over the land with brutal fists and fast guns. Fate had finally caught up with them - and now the merciless gang has but a single surviving member. When a deputized gunslinger takes up the call to hunt down the last Cowboy, the chase is on and the bullets fly and only one of these hardened men can survive.

programme.title: Sharkansas Women's Prison Massacre
programme.desc: When a fracking environmental accident rips apart the earth's crust, the resulting hole lets out prehistoric sharks from underground. The sharks target a group of women and trap them in a cabin.

programme.title: A Better Tomorrow III
programme.desc: A man travels from China to Vietnam, on the brink of war with America, to retrieve his uncle and cousin but find complications when he falls in love with a female gangster with a dangerous ex.

programme.title: 12 Rounds 3: Lockdown
programme.desc: A police officer attempts to turn in incriminating evidence of illegal activities against his fellow cops.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Nine criminals are placed on an island. Only the last person alive in 30 hours leaves the island.

programme.title: The Condemned 2
programme.desc: In the revamped Condemned Tournament, convicts must fight to the death in a game broadcast to the public.

programme.title: House of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: Ray becomes the chief suspect when the nightclub he is working at is robbed and the owner's son killed.

programme.title: Maximum Conviction
programme.desc: While transfering two female convicts, two former black ops agents are attacked by unknown assailants.

programme.title: Reawakening
programme.desc: John and Mary have lived in grief for ten years because their child, Clare, disappeared when she was fourteen. When Clare mysteriously returns, John suspects she's not who she claims to be, plunging the couple into a search for the truth.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Fist of the Condor
programme.desc: A martial-arts master battles the world's greatest assassins to protect a sacred, ancient manual from falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: The Final Master
programme.desc: With help from his apprentice (Song Yang), a Wing Chun practitioner (Liao Fan) must defeat eight martial arts academies before he can open his own school.

programme.title: Vengeance of an Assassin
programme.desc: An assassin escapes a battle and hides out in his childhood home. As he recovers, he realizes he has to fight faster and harder to survive.

programme.title: Sword Master
programme.desc: A master swordsman must once again wield his weapon against those who threaten his desire to live in peace.

programme.title: The Emperor's Sword
programme.desc: After hiding a deadly sword that bestows great power upon its wielder, the emperor dies and a deranged rebel seizes power. Now, the young daughter of a great general is all that stands between a tyrant and his quest for domination.

programme.title: Not My Family: The Monique Smith Story
programme.desc: Monique Smith goes on a decades-long search to discover who she really is.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: In a search for answers, a woman uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: Escaping the NXIVM Cult with Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: Catherine Oxenberg's personal fight to save her daughter

programme.title: Flint
programme.desc: Gripping retelling of a crisis that shook a nation

programme.title: Not My Family: The Monique Smith Story
programme.desc: Monique Smith goes on a decades-long search to discover who she really is.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: In a search for answers, a woman uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.title: Maternal Instinct
programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.title: Two Chefs and a Wedding Cake
programme.desc: A food critic at the top of her game meets a chef renowned for refusing food critics to his restaurant.

programme.title: Team Bride
programme.desc: Will Millington, heir to the bridal empire, comes into Hannah McKenzie's salon looking to revamp the brand.

programme.title: Unthinkable
programme.desc: A cop trying to solve her the murder of daughter-in-law is drawn into a cat-and-mouse game with the killer.

programme.title: Truth
programme.desc: Reporter's murder unites her college friend and former professor in a quest to uncover the killer's identity.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: Traffickers
programme.desc: Tiffany Cooper, disgraced by the military, wanted by the cops and running out of time, stops at nothing to take down a Trafficking Operation and save these young girls. Nothing is what it seems when everyone seems to be against you. Trust No One.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Nowhere to be Found
programme.desc: Two sisters go on a senior trip to Mexico, led by Ava’s boyfriend Trent. Meanwhile, journalist Jessica Vandross is going to the same Mexican town in search of her sister’s killer after escaping a sex trafficking ring. These stories collide, in a thrilling fight for their lives.

programme.title: Love Kills
programme.desc: In the heart of Atlanta's unpredictable dating scene, Darron is a hopeless romantic with the worst luck imaginable. Every time he believes he's found "the one," he ends up caught in another tangled web of passion, betrayal, and danger. When Darron finally meets someone who seems genuine, his past mistakes come back with a vengeance. One of his exes' jealous boyfriends discovers their hidden affair, setting off a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Murder on the Pole
programme.desc: One night Bunny was the queen of the dance floor; the next, she was a chalk outline. Dismissed by a department eager to sweep a "club girl's" death under the rug, Lola refuses to let her sister’s killer walk free. To find the murderer, Lola must infiltrate the world that claimed Bunny’s life—a world of predatory regulars, backstage betrayals, and a cover-up that goes higher than she ever imagined.

programme.title: The Loyalty Test
programme.desc: Trey Harrison is an up-and-coming internet star that has created a series exposing cheaters in orchestrated sting operations, successfully turning heartbreak into a viral spectacle. But when two participants are found murdered, Trey’s world begins to crumble and things only begin to escalate.

programme.title: Broken Harmony
programme.desc: Recording artist Harmony Brown, listens to every suggestion from her record label including changing her sound, changing her look, and even changing the type of music she sang. Yet, her numbers aren’t improving, and she’s on the verge of being released from her contract. Her manager, suggests she returns to Atlanta and meet with a power house music producer to give her a refresh on her sound. However, she’s forced to stay with and reunite with her mother, and address the trauma of her childhood.

programme.title: Alien Rubicon
programme.desc: A spacecraft lands in New York and heads toward our Capital. If it arrives, it will trigger an invasion.

programme.title: End Of The World
programme.desc: As a mass of solar storms causes tsunamis, volcanoes, and flooding, a family flees to high-elevation caves.

programme.title: Alien Predator
programme.desc: A black ops team sent to investigate the crash of an unidentified aircraft is hunted by the former occupants.

programme.title: Flight 666
programme.desc: Unseen spirits attack the passengers and crew of an international flight as they try to stop their killer.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy's past actions come back to haunt him when Serena from Season 1 tracks him down.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Plummeting temperatures signify the dawn of a new Ice Age.

programme.title: Hell House LLC 2
programme.desc: It's been eight years since the opening night tragedy of Hell House, LLC and still many unanswered questions remain. Thanks to an anonymous tip, investigative journalist Jessica Fox is convinced that key evidence is hidden inside the abandoned Abaddon Hotel-evidence that will shed light on the hotel's mysteries. She assembles a team equally hungry for answers with one goal: break into the hotel and discover the truth.

programme.title: Hell House LLC 3: Lake of Fire (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Set one year after the events of HELL HOUSE LLC 2, the Abaddon Hotel is on the verge of being torn down. It is purchased by billionaire Russell Wynn as the new home for his popular interactive show, Insomnia. He invites Vanessa Sheppard and her film crew to record everything leading up to the performance. They encounter a nefarious plot - one that threatens to unleash a veritable hell on earth.

programme.title: The Innkeepers (Edited Version)
programme.desc: After over one hundred years of service, The Yankee Pedlar Inn is shutting its doors for good. The last remaining employees -Claire (Sara Paxton) and Luke (Pat Healy)- are determined to uncover proof of what many believe to be one of New England's most haunted hotels. As the Inns final days draw near, odd guests check in as the pair of minimum wage ghost hunters begin to experience strange and alarming events that may ultimately cause them to be mere footnotes in the hotels long unexplained history.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: Banquet, A
programme.desc: A mother is radically tested when her teenage daughter insists a supernatural experience has left her body in service to a higher power.

programme.title: Mandrake
programme.desc: Mandrake follows probation officer Cathy Madden, who is given the task of rehabilitating notorious killer 'Bloody' Mary Laidlaw back into society after twenty years of jail.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins plays a ventriloquist whose dummy has a murderous mind of its own in this chilling psychological horror film written by legendary Hollywood scribe William Goldman.

programme.title: Scare Me
programme.desc: Scare Me

programme.title: The Amusement Park
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman goes to the amusement park, only to find himself in the middle of a hellish nightmare.

programme.title: Glorious
programme.desc: A heartbroken man finds himself trapped in a bathroom with a strange voice who says he may be the only hope in stopping a terrible event. A SHUDDER ORIGINAL

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Al Jennings Of Oklahoma

programme.title: Cry Blood Apache (Edited Version)
programme.desc: An Apache brave seeks vengeance on a band of sadistic gold hunters in this bloody drive-in western. Pitcalin (Jody McRae) leads the marauders who wipe out an Apache camp when they discover gold, only to watch their violent deeds lead to their own demise. Featuring a superb cast that also includes Dan Kemp, Robert Tessier, and Joel McRae, this coldblooded western tale was directed by character actor and filmmaker Jack Starrett (Cleopatra Jones, The Losers).

programme.title: Hell Town
programme.desc: In Hell Town (aka Born to the West) John Wayne is back in the saddle as two-fisted Dare Rudd, a roaming cowhand trying to prove he can win a woman's love and outwit a crooked saloon owner. This exciting B-movie from Paramount Pictures was based on a novel by western writer Zane Grey. With a wild and wooly cast that includes Johnny Mack Brown, Marsha Hunt, Monte Blue, and Lucian Littlefield, director Charles Barton (Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein) gives us a tale of romance, action, and high stakes gambling!

programme.title: Winds of the Wasteland
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this Republic Pictures western about the final days of the Pony Express. Former rider John Blair (Wayne) enters a coach race to win a $25,000 government mail contract, but there are dozens of obstacles in his path. The rest of the cast includes Lane Chandler and Phyllis Fraser, plus Lew Kelly (Lady of Burlesque) doing a great comic turn as Rocky OBrien, the eccentric, self-proclaimed mayor of a deserted mining town.

programme.title: In Old Colorado
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy and his crew get involved in a war over water rights in this feature from Harry Sherman Productions and Paramount Pictures. The intrigue starts when crafty Joe Weller (Morris Ankrum) turns two ranchers against each other, which leads to dire results. This is the 33rd of 66 Hopalong Cassidy movies, with WIlliam Boyd in the role he made famous. Also, look for regular Hoppy co-stars Russell Hayden as Lucky Jenkins, and Andy Clyde as California Carson.

programme.title: Hoppy Serves a Writ
programme.desc: Sheriff Hopalong Cassidy triumphs again in this lighthearted western romp from Harry Sherman Productions. Good ol' Hoppy (William Boyd) has to leave his beloved Texas to track down some bad guys in Oklahoma. You can bet that the action and suspense will follow Hopalong wherever he goes. Also, look for a number of familiar faces in the ast, including TV's future Superman George Reeves, notorious Hollywood heavy Victor Jory, and in his first credited role, Robert Mitchum! In fact, Mitchum would appear in more of Hoppy's adventures before branching out on his own and becoming one of Hollywood's greatest stars. Also featuring Jan Christy, Forbes Murray, Byron Foulger, Earle Hodgins, and Roy Barcroft. Directed by Goerge Archainbaud.

programme.title: The Outlaw
programme.desc: Billy the Kid, Pat Garrett, and Doc Holliday ride again in Howard Hughes' epic 1943 western, but the character you'll remember most is sultry country vixen Rio McDonald. Hughes' nationwide search for an actress to play Rio resulted in the film debut of Jane Russell, whose natural assets were allegedly helped by a special bra designed by Hughes. When The Outlaw finally received a nationwide release in 1946, its success vindicated Hughes and made Russell a star. As for Hughes' infamous bra, Russell said in her 1988 memoir, I never wore it, and he never knew.

programme.title: Doc Holliday 2
programme.desc: After the OK Coral shootout in Tombstone, Doc Holliday opens a small Faro Saloon in a remote town where he encounters Edward Bailey. When a Faro game goes wrong for Edward, he turns up missing and Doc Holliday finds himself on trial for his murder.

programme.title: Woman Walks Ahead
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this riveting western follows a headstrong New York widow (Jessica Chastain) as she journeys west to meet Sioux chief Sitting Bull, facing off with an army officer (Sam Rockwell) intent on war with Native Americans.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We’re here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you’re in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.desc: With whimsical trills and unexpected intonations, Glenn Wool's precision high-low comedy captivates but does not coddle.

programme.title: Daniel Lobell: Reconquistador
programme.desc: In 1492, Spain kicked out all the Jews! Five hundred and some years later, Daniel Lobell figured, what the hell? It's probably safe to go back.

programme.title: Comedy Club Superstars
programme.desc: Ten of America's top comedians share how they got into comedy, early influences, and their parents' reactions. Round-table segments with Paul Reiser, Bill Maher, Carol Liefer, Larry Miller, and George Wallace feature stories on tough crowds, hecklers, and big breaks. Includes classic clips from Andy Kaufman, Robert Klein, Jackie Vernon, George Carlin, Joan Rivers, and Richard Pryor.

programme.title: Get Outta' My Way: The Best Of Ollie Joe Prater
programme.desc: Ollie Joe Prater lived the American Dream LARGE. Ollie was the funniest unknown comedian in the 1980s until his premature death shortly thereafter, from problems arising from his 500 lb weight. Watch him and his friends' interviews of the legend himself.

programme.title: Chris Porter: Ugly and Angry
programme.desc: Last Coming Standing alum, Chris Porter, gives his look on drugs, growing old, women’s fashion.

programme.title: Chris Porter: A Man From Kansas
programme.desc: Chris Porter discusses everything from hipsters ruining food, to being a man.

programme.title: Iliza Shlesinger: War Paint

programme.title: Whitney Cummings: Money Shot
programme.desc: Money Shot finds Cummings riffing on a wide range of topics.

programme.title: Ilana Glazer: The Planet is Burning

programme.title: Jeff Garcia: Livin' The Dream
programme.desc: Famed Latino comedian and voiceover artist, Jeff Garcia.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A former getaway driver jeopardizes his Witness Protection Plan.

programme.title: Georgia Rule
programme.desc: A troubled young woman is sent to live with her grandmother for the summer, while hiding a secret that could potentially tear her family apart.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: A washed-up writer forms an unlikely friendship with a teenager from Long Island.

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: King Arthur and his Knights of the Round Table embark on a surreal.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: For the Fourth of July, Michael Symon showcases his approach to smoked ribs, starting with a custom cherry BBQ sauce made from cherry juice, sherry vinegar, molasses, bourbon, cold brew coffee, and warm spices. He explains his smoking technique at 300-325°F for two and a half hours, finishing the ribs on the grill for char and caramelization. Meanwhile, Liz Symon prepares a tart cherry Negroni—an equal-parts cocktail featuring gin, Campari, sweet vermouth, tart cherry juice, and a splash of seltzer. The episode balances savory and sweet as the hosts discuss rib texture preferences, ideal side dishes, and the versatility of the cherry sauce.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon reunite in the kitchen for the very first episode of CHEWED UP. Carla makes Sweet Potato Hummus, Michael debates the name, Clinton avoids cooking, and the chaos kicks off immediately.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon dive into a tailgating-themed episode of CHEWED UP with Michael leading the charge. He fries up crispy Pork Schnitzel Sliders while sharing wild football stories, Carla admits she’s barely tailgated in her life, and Clinton once again finds himself assigned kitchen tasks he may or may not be qualified for. Between talk of The Chew’s abrupt cancellation, psychic predictions, and potato roll “squish” debates, the chaos continues.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton ushers in sweater weather with a decadent, over-the-top hot chocolate while the crew revisits the infamous "Eggnog-gate" story - a stomach-turning behind-the-scenes tale from their network TV days. Cozy vibes meet barely appropriate storytelling.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off the week with Crispy Baked Chicken Wings tossed in a hot honey and lime glaze. The hosts look back on the freeing final weeks of The Chew before its abrupt end, and Michael delivers a passionate rant against air fryers. The trio introduces their new interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and Clinton shares a hilarious story about how eating messy wings on a date made him realize he was gay!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall brings the heat with a comforting Nashville Hot Chicken Mac and Cheese. Carla builds a heavily spiced, vibrant cheese sauce and folds in crispy chicken and large elbow pasta. The hosts reminisce about Carla's famous ground nut stew from Top Chef, discuss their competitive streaks, and debate the merits of retro candies like Peeps and the 100 Grand bar.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces fall with a recipe for Pumpkin Spice Muffins that double as cupcakes when topped with frosting. While the treats bake, the hosts debate whether muffins belong at breakfast or dessert and share their absolute worst live television disasters including Michael cooking during an active fire and Clinton slicing his finger on live TV.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Monday with an appetizer: Deviled Eggs Three Ways, including a beautiful beet-soaked variation. Things go hilariously off the rails when Carla accidentally adds too much liquid to her yolk filling, turning it into a soupy mess. The hosts embrace the chaos and try to fix it, while also chatting about the Wicked movie, hating cottage cheese, and giving away a trio of Pop Mustard.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly elevates lunchtime with savory French Onion Soup Tartines, topped with melted Gruyere. While the onions caramelize, the trio discusses their love for French food, debates the perfect early dinner time for getting older, and shares hilarious stories about awkward fan encounters including the time a woman on a crowded train told Clinton he looked "so much fatter in person".

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Michael Symon is baking up a batch of his famous brown butter bittersweet chocolate chip cookies. While the cookies bake, the hosts hilariously debate the size of Michael's head, share the secret to always having warm cookies ready, and Clinton confesses his crush on former NPR host David Greene. The episode wraps up with a Frontgate apron giveaway and plenty of sweet, chaotic banter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a quick, "uptown trashy" appetizer: Deviled Cheese Toast. While baking the cheesy, pickle-studded baguette slices, the hosts discuss nostalgic white bread, launch their interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and go on a passionate rant against celebrities who lie about taking weight-loss injections.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts welcome their first guest, Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja. Michael Symon prepares crispy Beef Kefta, while Ayesha whips up her famous Whipped Feta. Ayesha shares the inspiring story of how she broke into the restaurant industry by sweeping floors, and the group dishes on the intense reality of competing on Bobby Flay's Titans.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja sticks around for a hilarious Friday dessert episode as Carla Hall bakes her portable Sweet Potato Cobbler Bars. The group shares funny stories about accidentally cursing in front of kids, debates the most overrated desserts, and reveals the secret ingredients their grandmothers used to make their family recipes so special.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Preparing for Tyler Huggins" - This week’s guest, Tyler Huggins (founder and CEO of Meati), is on his way in to the studio. Dave’s not feeling confident, but he starts prepping for the meal anyway.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Dinner with Tyler Huggins" - Our guest this week is Tyler Huggins, founder and CEO of Meati. Dave has prepared a worldwide tour of bar foods that includes “pizza okonomiyaki,” hwe dup bap, galbijjim, and Korean army stew.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Chicken Meatloaf with Creamed Corn and Mashed Potatoes - Chef Keith Corbin joins Chris in the kitchen to put together another easy family-friendly meal: chicken meatloaf with a zesty creamed corn and garlicy, buttery mashed potatoes.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Niku Udon; Lemongrass-Caramel Chicken; Stir-Fried Angel Hair Pasta - Chris is in the kitchen to take you through three winning recipes from his rotation: A comforting udon noodle dish with thin slices of beef in a smoky, savory, slightly sweet broth; simple braised/stir-fried chicken that is somewhere between Vietnamese clay pot catfish and Taiwanese Three Cup Chicken; and a go-to quick pasta with tofu and veggies stir-fried in a flavor-packed sauce.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Sliders 3-ways, Because Kids Love Small Food: Kids love to eat small foods! It's a fact. Chris Ying shares three different ways he makes miniature burgers for his family, including Dad's Hacky BBQ Pork Char Siu, a ground pork slider and a traditional ground beef slider.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Fluffy, Buttery Biscuits for the Kiddos: Let's be clear: These are not the biscuits that chef Joshua Skenes used to serve at his three-Michelin-star restaurant Saison. Have I had those biscuits? Yes. Have I watched Josh make biscuits? Yes. Do I have his recipe in my phone? Maybe. Do I glance at that recipe whenever I set out to make biscuits for my kids? Well, wouldn't you? Jokes aside, Josh's biscuits are world-class, and are a product of not just the recipe, but his products and experience. I'm never gonna get them exactly right, but the ones I make are inspired by his. They're definitely passable and my kids can take them in whichever direction they like. My daughter likes it savory. My son likes them smothered in jam.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Butter Board" - Wow, even Chris couldn’t resist the call of the #butterboard. Here he makes an anchovy-onion-olive version inspired by something he saw on TikTok and his favorite French-Italian flatbread, pissaladière

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Chicken Pot Pie" - Chris makes a recipe for beginner chicken pot pie from Allrecipes.com, using leftover chicken and canned potatoes. Yes, potatoes from a can.

programme.desc: Emeril prepares his favorite football menu. These are the dishes that Emeril serves to his family and friends!

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: After a visit to Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite recipes.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels to the Rosebud Native American Reservation in South Dakota and spends time with the Lakota people who are pursuing the “7-generation framework” – their vision for the next 150 years. She learns about the work they are doing to reclaim their food sovereignty, their culture and language, to bring their people back to that sacred place of equilibrium that is essential in building a strong and sovereign tribal nation - where they are physically, spiritually, and mentally whole.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels back to the South of France, where she once cooked at a Michelin restaurant, and spends time in the olive harvest with a family who is carrying on the tradition of making olive oil. We learn about the herbs that are grown by a farmer late in the season to be infused in the olive oil, and how the oil is used by the baker who is baking bread using heirloom wheat.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia brings the audience into the kitchen with her to share delicious garden to table recipes. Along the way she pays a visit to an artisan beeswax candle maker who teaches her the art of candle making. Georgia then goes to sit at the pottery wheel with a gifted ceramicist to create candle holders and elements for a table setting.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: In preparation for a dinner party, Georgia searches for wild edibles in unlikely places, and pays a visit to a pair of women glass blowers who create works of usable art in their glass studio in Brooklyn, New York. They work together to make glass pieces for the dinner table. Georgia brings us back to the kitchen to cook delicious dishes and set a table with their glassware.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: For Jacques, a rite of spring is to enjoy the salad his father made every year at this time… Spring is also when asparagus appears and he pairs it with grilled tuna. He cooks fresh peas as soon as they arrive in the market and Jacques, not wanting to waste anything, uses the pods to make a soup. He ends with his friend Ed’s Pasta Primavera…

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques enjoyed many new food trends. But on a cold damp night, he still craves classic dishes like onion soup or for a family dinner or an elegant meal, a roast chicken. For him, these dishes will never go out of fashion, just like the apple galette he's been making for decades.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacues knows that most of us want to eat a healthy diet with lots of organic produce. Now so much is available at farmers markets and in grocery stores, you don’t have to spend a fortune if you chose what’s in season when it tastes the best. But for those times you’re in a hurry, it’s okay to grab prewashed, precut or frozen vegetables to make your life easier.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques shows that with a well-stocked pantry and a few good cooking techniques, you can make a tasty dish or a simple meal. His pantry essentials include potato flakes for a simple soup, spaghetti for a quick main dish, lentils, canned salmon, polenta and finally, in the freezer, a poundcake that can be transformed into a celebration dessert.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Gathering with family and friends around the table or for a game of boules is the life’s greatest pleasure for Jacques. He makes chicken wings, cucumber soup, merguez sausage, zucchini canapes, hummus and his father’s Fromage Fort. Simple food that can be made ahead means that you can enjoy a glass of wine with your company.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves seafood and feels lucky to live by Long Island Sound with its wonderful stocks of Atlantic fish and shellfish. He prepares scallops, crab and cod––raw, fried, sauteed or grilled in dishes that are quick, simple and delicious.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: When the weather heats up it’s time for family dishes that work on the grill or in the pan. Jacques' great summer menu with Asparagus in Butter Sauce, a Grilled Steak with Zucchini, topped with Anchovy Butter, Curly Dogs for the kids. He shows you classic ways to cut potatoes and ends with a Patriotic Raspberry and Blueberry Galette.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Today is all about sustainability; eating in a way that’s good for us and the planet. Diane cooks up a colorful, mostly plant-based feast that celebrates fresh, local ingredients, big flavor, and a small footprint! She’ll discuss the Mediterranean way of eating with legendary Greek physician, scientist, and nutritionist, Dr. Antonia Trichopoulou.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Olive oil, the single most important ingredient in the Greek and Mediterranean diet and possible key to living longer. Diane talks to Harvard University School of Public Health Professor Emeritus Dr. Walter Willett about olive oil and longevity. In her kitchen, she’ll cook up a menu of olive oil forward dishes and teach her son, Yiorgos, how to make olive oil chocolate mousse.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Phyllo has been part of Greek cuisine for centuries and provides an easy backdrop to countless dishes, from appetizers to desserts. Diane has fun with phyllo creating; a crunchy topping to a spanakopita salad, a crispy phyllo pizza and finally a true Greek classic – baklava.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In ancient Greece Plutarch famously stated, "We do not sit at a table to eat but to eat together." Diane cooks up a series of meze dishes that are easy to prepare, healthy, and made to be savored with others. She’ll be speaking with Dr. Esther Sternberg, author of Well at Work and former Research Director, Andrew Weil Center for Integrative Medicine.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating 40! 40 original episodes, that is. So Mar’s looking back at three full seasons of Casual Luxury designs. Our favorite moments and yours. Join Mar and the Team on this very special episode as we look back at many of the places, characters, fun, makeovers and trips that make the series special—plus a rare look at the very beginning and some new reveals, too. Celebrate with us!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar takes Mary Alice—new to Westport—and he just sold her a new condo. He takes her through his Casual Luxury transformation of her new condo step-by-step. Remove walls? Check! Add rooms? Check! Take some risks? Check! A total renovation that requires many hands—and dancing feet—to get to the finish line. But what will she think?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mary Alice's new condo has gone through many changes on each floor and in every room. Removing walls and adding space has revealed a Casual Luxury environment. After months of renovations and many design decisions, it's time to finally reveal to Mary Alice her new Wonderland. With so much at stake, it's fingers crossed!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: This home on Punch Bowl Drive in Westport is spacious in every way—except the kitchen. Stuck in its 1970's profile, it feels cramped and ready for a renovation. Mar redesigns this dated kitchen to meet the needs of a 21st-century family. Every bit of space is meticulously reworked with Casual Luxury for function and entertaining.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: There is no place like home but with a break in the design schedule, there's time for an upgrade. So Mar is finally addressing his primary bedroom (and bathroom) at his home Rosebrook Gardens. With space at a premium, how will the wish list for a wall of jaw-dropping built-in closets and more be possible? It's gonna take more than a Casual Luxury design to create the perfect space.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After Mar finishes his Primary Bedroom reveal to the team they finally see the new primary bath—the oasis of his dreams, an extraordinary use of the space. It's the perfect complement to his new bedroom and brand new built-in storage. Watch his journey renovating his en suite in Casual Luxury style.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar's real estate business is booming and the MARket is hot! When he lists a charming, renovated 1880's home, the family is already out—and so are their furnishings. So he creates Casual Luxury from room to room as usual, this time with a staging partner to help transform the space. Does he get the offers he expects?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After selling a client's home in Westport, CT, Mar is asked to design their new New York City apartment. The catch? It has to be completed in under 24 hours! From move in to unpacking to staging….the clock is ticking and the client will be back soon—does Casual Luxury work in the Big Apple and in a time crunch?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Paul gets a new client call from people who have just downsized. Their new place is great—except for odd layouts and wasted space. They want Mar's magic touch while they are traveling. Not a small project: a total kitchen and primary bedroom & bath demo and reno in less than a month. Can Mar create the perfect space without the client present? Will they love Mar's Casual Luxury designs?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar continues his rush reno while clients are away. Primary bedroom and bathroom, plus a kitchen—without the client present. A lot is going right—but will it be what they really expect? Despite Mar's award-winning design eye, when the clients return, how highly will they rate these Casual Luxury results?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: A year in the making! Mar goes rogue using short amounts of time between projects this season and decides to do a complete Casual Luxury backyard and Garden Studio redesign and renovation at his own home. With Paul banned from being on the property, can he sneak a peek before the big reveal to Mar's guests? (Stay tuned for a last minute surprise!)

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Sometimes Mar has to hide things from viewers, but not this episode! This special edition is a true behind-the-scenes of season 4: Oops we can't believe it happened; Yikes, we're showing you; and New: some scenes that didn't quite make it to air. Exclusive, hand-selected, and fun moments you won't see anywhere else. Mar says 'Keep it casual'—if he can keep a straight face.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar has known the Breslin family a long time now—first as home buyers, then as clients, soon as friends, and now as extended family. Union House has evolved with their needs (and with casual luxury), but one last detail remains: the built—but empty—pool house. It needs to be a jewel in time for the summer—and if it's done Mar will get to have a dog-gone party for puppy Clover!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Tis the season to be MARry! Join Mar and the team for a wonderful and meaningful celebration at Rosebrook Gardens. Wondrously creative holiday touches are everywhere you look, both inside and out. Join the crowds of people who want to come and see for themselves. Treat yourself to lights, decorations, carolers, and lots of good cheer, all done the Casual Luxury way.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The O'Kane family's patience is truly tested during a complete to-the-studs kitchen renovation. Homeowner Yvonne starts to get impatient to feed her family home cooked dinners. Added pressure: another fireplace to deal with, uneven floors, custom cabinets and an uncovered secret staircase. (All that plus a new puppy.) Thanks to Mar's 6 design principles this custom space is unique and stunning.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Down By The Bay - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see cat wearing a hat? How about a goat rowing a boat? Well you can in this video for the classic children’s song, Down By The Bay!

programme.title: Mr. Pig & Mr. Mouse Have A Mess On Their Hands - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig love making food and having their friends over to eat it. But afterwards, their house is a complete mess! It's so gross, they don't even want to drive their van home to clean up. How can Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig share their love of food with their friends without cluttering their home? Mr. Monkey has a tasty idea! What is it? Watch and find out!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. Learn simple words about the sea like water, coral reef, and ocean through narration and repetition. Engaging live-action footage of your favorite ocean friends and classical melodies will dazzle your little explorer as they experience the magical world under the sea.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.
